provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the foreigner is current and real.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of at least one objective criterion.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel/identity document, is recognised by their country's authority, or falls under a direct laissez-passer nationality category.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_apply_for_international_protecti.name: did_not_apply_for_international_protection_within_period
did_not_apply_for_international_protecti.description: The foreigner did not make an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Criterion 1: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory period.

used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or pushback.

committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.description: The foreigner committed fraud or used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Criterion 2: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementing or supervising compliance with regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Criterion 3: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_or_removal_measure
failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restrictin.name: failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_public_order_measure
failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restrictin.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those referred to in criterion 4.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Criterion 4: the foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, freedom-restricting, public order, or equivalent Member State measure.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Criterion 5: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_adverse_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or a pushback or removal measure.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Criterion 6: the foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence, pushback, or removal decision.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: The foreigner, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Criterion 7: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which resulted in a negative decision or did not lead to the issuance of a residence permit.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Criterion 8: the foreigner has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: The foreigner, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Criterion 9: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.name: declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_file_shows_purpose_other_tha.description: The foreigner declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Criterion 10: the foreigner declared or their file shows they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Criterion 11: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
